sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section I, List of Answers on Topics 34:1

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section I, List of Answers on Topics 34:1
items.html: The will that is necessarily there, had a desire to embellish itself and resemble the form of the light completely, and that became the “cause” for the creation of the worlds. (Inner Light, Part 1, Chap 1, item 90)
